issues.comment: Off-by-one in totalPages pagination calculation. The formula `Math.floor(user_count / limit) + 1` produces an extra phantom page when user_count is evenly divisible by limit. For example, 50 users with limit 50 gives 2 pages instead of 1. This causes the "next" button to remain enabled on the last page and allows navigation to an empty results page. Fix: use `Math.ceil(user_count / limit)` instead.

Test uses wrong HTTP method for remove_member. The route is defined as DELETE but the test uses :put. While RSpec controller specs bypass routing so the test passes, it doesn't validate the correct HTTP verb. In production, a PUT to the same path would route to add_members instead of remove_member. Fix: change `xhr :put` to `xhr :delete`.
